summary.title: Period Summary
summary.conversions: Your ads are delivering results! You achieved {{conversions}} {{conversionLabel}} investing {{spend}}{{costText}}.

summary.no_spend: No investment recorded this period. Your campaigns may be paused or have no synced data.
summary.default: You invested {{spend}} in the period with {{conversions}} {{conversionLabel}} recorded. Keep monitoring to identify trends.
summary.costAvg: — each result cost an average of {{cost}}
